<!-- _class: lead -->

# News Talk Title

The one-sentence thesis that ties the reporting together

<!-- cover-links -->

---

## What Changed

- First factual claim with an appendix link. <sup><a href="#appendix-a01">A01</a></sup>
- Second factual claim with an appendix link. <sup><a href="#appendix-a02">A02</a></sup>
- Third factual claim with an appendix link. <sup><a href="#appendix-a03">A03</a></sup>

---

## Why It Matters

- Interpret the reporting without outrunning the sources. <sup><a href="#appendix-a04">A04</a></sup>
- Separate hard facts from synthesis claims. <sup><a href="#appendix-a05">A05</a></sup>
- Tighten dates if the source bundle supports a range better than a single day. <sup><a href="#appendix-a06">A06</a></sup>

---

## Discussion Prompt

- What matters most in this story for builders, operators, or product teams?
- Which claim feels strongest, and which claim depends on interpretation?

---

Each factual bullet above should point to one appendix id.
